description_long: This modern house features a two-story structure with a flat roof and extensive use of glass, stone, and wood on its exterior. The ground floor is characterized by large, floor-to-ceiling windows framed by stone columns, providing ample natural light and a contemporary aesthetic. The upper floor includes a spacious terrace with outdoor seating, a pergola, and a large umbrella, suggesting a focus on outdoor living. The landscaping includes a paved walkway, manicured grass, and rows of conical shrubs along the sides, enhancing curb appeal. The house also features a partially covered carport or garage area beneath the terrace. The overall design emphasizes clean lines, open spaces, and a harmonious blend of natural and modern materials.
description: A modern two-story house with large glass windows, stone columns, and a spacious terrace featuring outdoor seating and landscaping with shrubs and paved walkways.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, large windows, terrace with umbrella and seating, and a paved walkway leading to the house.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the stone columns, terrace overhang, and a row of conical shrubs along the side.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the full width of the terrace, glass windows, and the carport or garage area beneath the terrace.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the terrace, pergola, umbrella, and additional stonework with a few shrubs near the corner.
attribute_window_arrangement: symmetrical rows of large picture windows
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with wide steps, a covered porch, and a minimalist door framed by stone columns and large glass panels.
